target: 6. Unseen Warrior
Hah… Hah…

(How could I have imagined…
walking this far along a mountain path…
Maybe the forest is a child's playground…)

Hizuru-chan!
Over here, over here!

Don't run around in the mountains.
It's dangerous.
It's totally fine!
What's your basis for that…

Also, is this the right path?
I don't know these roads well.

No need to worry~!
I've memorized all the paths around here~!

Hey…
At least tell me where we're going.
Are you leading me to the artillery ruins?
Nope, not at all!
What are you two doing there!?

Hey, don't go into the bushes!
There are vipers here!

There you are!
It's Nezu-san!

Ah?
Who is it, Hoine-chan?

(This hunter… seems to know Hoine.
How broad his connections are, this niece of mine)

What are you here for?
I told you not to come near here.

But if I wanted to meet Nezu-san,
there's no other place to come to, right?

How many times have you come here saying that?
Enough already.

(This hunter… seems to know Hoine.
How broad his connections are, this niece of mine)
Here, take this and go home.
Hehehe~, thanks!

Look, Hizuru-chan!
It's candy in the shape of flowers!
Your old body… such a cute hobby.

Hmph…
If you don't listen when I say to take some candy,
I'll just have it on me.

Hmm, so this is an effective method
to tame a child like Hoine.
I'll take note of it.

If an adult is with you,
you should have stopped you before coming here.
There are wild boars and vipers here.

So… I would have liked to hear that
before coming here.
Ah, I remember.
…What?
You said you're Hizuru from the Minakata family.
Do you know me?
It's a small island.
So… that's how.

(Even though I was with Hoine, 
he recognized me as a Minakata)

(We've barely even met, 
and I've been away from the island for years)

It's a bother.
Go away quickly.
(This hunter is quite interesting…)
Hehe, it worked out.
…What?

Hizuru-chan, you're really interested in Nezu-san, aren't you?
It was worth bringing you here.

Could it be… you brought me here
to meet this hunter?
That's right!

(Yes… even though it's called 'island tour',
there's no need to focus on touring the island's locations)

(Connecting with interesting people on the island
can also be called an 'island tour')
…My niece is quite formidable.

Ah?
What are you talking about?

Ah, don't mind it.
This is our conversation.

Rather, may I ask you a question?
Why do you work as a hunter?

Huh?
What's the point of asking that?

There's no deep meaning to the question.
Just answer instinctively.

Even though I told you to leave quickly,
this woman won't listen…

If you answer the question, I'll let you go.
Why do you work as a hunter?

There are many people on this island
who are troubled by pests…
Well, that's about it.
I see… So you're protecting the island secretly.

Hmph, it's not that noble.
If you're done, get out quickly.

(A secret warrior…
Common, but not bad at all)

(The people who support the world
are usually unnoticed in daily life)
But being a hunter seems rather plain.
W-What are you talking about all of a sudden!?
No, it depends on the world's setting…
…What have you been talking about all this time?

Hizuru-chan, let's go to the next place soon!
Bye, Nezu-san!
Excuse me.
What are those two?
See you later~!
I told you not to come back!!
Hehe, wasn't it fun?
Well… yeah.

It was worth the effort
to come this far.
Next, this way!
Hey, I told you not to run!
